'''√p-h-t''' ('''kapahat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:labilise|labilise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-h-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labilise|labilise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √p-h-t
|-
! Lemma
| kapahat
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thipahat || jipahat || shipahat || kipahat
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthupahat || jujupahat || shushupahat || kukupahat
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thupahat || jupahat || shupahat || kupahat
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thupahat || jupahat || shupahat || kupahat
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thepahat || jepahat || shepahat || kepahat
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothopahat || jojopahat || shoshopahat || kokopahat
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thopahat || jopahat || shopahat || kopahat
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thopahat || jopahat || shopahat || kopahat
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || pahat || pahat || pahat || pahat
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || pahat || pahat || pahat || pahat
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || pahat || pahat || pahat || pahat
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || pahat || pahat || pahat || pahat
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæpahat || jæpahat || shæpahat || kæpahat
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathapahat || jajapahat || shashapahat || kakapahat
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thapahat || japahat || shapahat || kapahat
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thapahat || japahat || shapahat || kapahat
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shapahat
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshapahat
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishapahat
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shapahatnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshapahatnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishapahatnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shapahatshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshapahatnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishapahatshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shapahatro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshapahatnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishapahatro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shapahatmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshapahatnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishapahatmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shapahatsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshapahatnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishapahatsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shapahatng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshapahatnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishapahatng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shapahatya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshapahatnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishapahatya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shapahatyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshapahatnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishapahatyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shapahatnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshapahatnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishapahatnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shapahatnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshapahatnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishapahatnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shapahatnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshapahatnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishapahatnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shapahatshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshapahatnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishapahatshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shapahatshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshapahatnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishapahatshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shapahatshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshapahatnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishapahatshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shapahatronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshapahatnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishapahatronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shapahatroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshapahatnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishapahatroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shapahatromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshapahatnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishapahatromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shapahatmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshapahatnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishapahatmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shapahatmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshapahatnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishapahatmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shapahatmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshapahatnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishapahatmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
